reviews.comment:
Es muy lindo el parque con variedad de arboles y bastante bien mantenido. Gracias que sigue siendo gratuito, libre y abierto, sin rejas!!! Es muy lindo para sentarte a tomar unos mates o llevar a los perritos al parque

(Translated by Google)
The park is lovely, with a variety of trees and is quite well maintained. Thankfully, it remains free and open, without fences! It's a great place to sit and drink some mate or take the dogs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZLTRyRUh3EAE
